response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior full-stack and backend software engineer, but completely lacks the hardware architecture, SoC modeling, and deep learning workload optimization skills required for this role. Their background is focused on web development, microservices, and testing rather than hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across various stacks, including C++ and DLang.
Demonstrated ability to build scalable backend systems and microservices handling high-throughput traffic.
Strong background in test-driven development, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship.
concerns: Lacks required experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No background in deep neural network training, inference optimization, or GPU architecture.
Experience is heavily focused on web and backend development rather than hardware performance architecture.
